site.name: AI Beauty Stylist
site.description: AI-powered personalized makeup diagnosis, tutorials, and product recommendations.

hero.headline: Find the look that's truly yours — not someone else's tutorial.
hero.lead: Upload a bare-face selfie. Get AI-powered shade diagnosis, personalized looks, and step-by-step tutorials you can actually follow.

howItWorks.headline: Three steps to your perfect look — and how to create it.
howItWorks.subheadline: Upload a selfie → Get your AI diagnosis and looks → Follow the tutorial and shop the kit.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Take a front-facing, bare-face photo. It's used only for generating your personalized plan — deletable anytime.
howItWorks.step2Desc: AI analyzes your skin tone and facial features, then recommends the best matching looks with clear reasoning.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Every look comes with step-by-step instructions and real product recommendations so you can actually do it.

inspiration.headline: Find the vibe first, then learn how to recreate it.
inspiration.subheadline: Every look is designed for a real scenario. Tap into the one that speaks to you and start your try-on.

scenarios.headline: Makeup advice that fits your next event, not just a color wheel.

trust.headline: Works across all skin tones, face shapes, ages, and makeup intensity levels.

stylePicker.heading: What's your makeup identity?
stylePicker.lead: Pick a direction that fits how you want to look — by aesthetic, by feature, or by how much time you have. Set one as your default and we'll remember it next time.
stylePicker.emptyState: No styles match those filters yet — try clearing one.

tryOn.heading: Upload a selfie. Discover the looks made for you.
tryOn.subheading: No filters. Real analysis of your skin tone and features, matched to looks and tutorials you can actually follow.
tryOn.privacyStrip: Used only for your recommendations · Deletable anytime
tryOn.privacyNote1: Your photo is used only to generate your diagnosis — never shared with third parties.
tryOn.privacyNote2: It's never used to train AI models.
tryOn.privacyNote3: You can delete it anytime, and it auto-deletes within 24 hours.
tryOn.uploadHint: Drag & drop or click to select — JPEG or PNG, max 10 MB

membership.headline: Your shortcut to looking exactly like you want — without the guesswork.

shadeFinder.heading: Shade Finder
shadeFinder.subheading: Answer 3 questions. Find your perfect lip shade in 30 seconds.
shadeFinder.privacyNote: No selfie upload needed · private 3-question quiz
shadeFinder.loadingDetail: Matching your undertone, look preference, and shade library.
shadeFinder.ctaHeading: This is just the starting point.
shadeFinder.ctaDetail: Upload a selfie for AI-powered analysis of your actual features and skin tone — get 3 personalized looks with step-by-step tutorials.
shadeFinder.diagnosisCoolSummary: Your skin has a cool undertone. Blue-based pinks, roses, and berries work best. Warm oranges may look muddy.
shadeFinder.diagnosisCoolReason1: Rose pinks and berry shades are your ideal family
shadeFinder.diagnosisCoolReason3: Matching lip and cheek tones creates a cleaner finish
shadeFinder.diagnosisWarmSummary: Your skin has a warm undertone. Corals, peaches, and warm browns work best. Cool blue-pinks may wash you out.
shadeFinder.diagnosisWarmReason1: Coral and peach shades are your ideal family
shadeFinder.diagnosisWarmReason3: Warm brown nudes are your everyday go-to
shadeFinder.diagnosisNeutralSummary: Your skin is neutral — most shade families work. You can confidently try roses through corals.
shadeFinder.diagnosisNeutralReason1: Both warm and cool families work for you
shadeFinder.diagnosisNeutralReason2: Rose is your safest everyday choice
shadeFinder.diagnosisNeutralReason3: Switch freely based on scenario and outfit
shadeFinder.diagnosisOlive: Cool Olive Undertone · Olive Cool Type
shadeFinder.diagnosisOliveSummary: Your skin has a unique yellow-green base. Muted dusty roses and berries work best. Pure warm shades may look muddy.
shadeFinder.diagnosisOliveReason1: Muted cool-toned roses are your ideal family
shadeFinder.diagnosisOliveReason2: Avoid pure oranges and neon pinks
shadeFinder.diagnosisOliveReason3: Berry shades enhance your skin's clarity

undertoneQuiz.heading: What is my skin undertone?
undertoneQuiz.lead: Five quick questions, one clear answer. Find out whether your skin undertone is warm, cool, or neutral — the single most important factor in choosing lipstick and foundation that flatters your face.
undertoneQuiz.veinsQuestion: Look at the inside of your wrist in natural daylight. What colour are your veins?
undertoneQuiz.veinsHint: The single most reliable physical undertone signal.
undertoneQuiz.veinsOption3: A mix of blue and green — hard to tell
undertoneQuiz.jewelryQuestion: Which jewellery makes your skin look brighter — silver or gold?
undertoneQuiz.jewelryHint: Try both against your face in daylight if you are not sure.
undertoneQuiz.sunQuestion: How does your skin react to direct sun?
undertoneQuiz.sunOption1: Tans easily, rarely burns — turns golden or olive
undertoneQuiz.sunOption2: Burns first, then maybe tans pink or stays fair
undertoneQuiz.sunOption3: Burns a little, then tans evenly
undertoneQuiz.paperQuestion: Hold a sheet of pure white paper next to your bare face. Compared to the paper, your skin looks…
undertoneQuiz.paperHint: Use daylight from a window. No makeup, no filters.
undertoneQuiz.paperOption3: Beige or balanced — not clearly warm or cool
undertoneQuiz.lipstickQuestion: Which lipstick shade has historically looked best on you?
undertoneQuiz.lipstickHint: Think of compliments, not your favourite tube.
undertoneQuiz.lipstickOption3: Both warm and cool reds work — or I have never been sure
undertoneQuiz.resultWarmSummary: Your skin has a yellow, peach, or golden base. Gold jewellery, peach blush, and terracotta or warm brick lipsticks will bring out your natural glow.
undertoneQuiz.resultCoolSummary: Your skin has a pink, rosy, or red base. Silver jewellery, rose or berry blush, and blue-based reds or mauve lipsticks will make your face look brighter.
undertoneQuiz.resultNeutralSummary: Your skin balances warm and cool. You can wear shades from both families. The most flattering picks are balanced rose, rose-brown, soft red, and muted berry.
undertoneQuiz.seoContent1: Undertone is the subtle hue underneath the surface of your skin. It does not change with tan, season, or skincare. Most people fall into one of three: warm (yellow, peach, golden), cool (pink, rosy, red), or neutral (a balanced mix).
undertoneQuiz.seoHeading2: Warm vs cool vs neutral — what each means for makeup
undertoneQuiz.seoContent2: Warm undertones look best in gold jewellery, peach blush, and warm brick lipstick. Cool undertones shine in silver jewellery, rose blush, and blue-based reds. Neutral undertones can borrow from both but should avoid the extremes.
undertoneQuiz.seoHeading3: How to read your undertone yourself
undertoneQuiz.seoContent3: The three classic checks are vein colour in daylight, jewellery contrast, and sun reaction. Take all in natural light, no makeup. If two out of three point the same direction, that is your undertone.
undertoneQuiz.seoContent4: The quiz nails undertone direction. For full diagnosis including foundation depth, blush, and tutorials, upload a selfie at our AI Try-On Studio.
undertoneQuiz.seoFaq1Answer: Undertone is the subtle hue underneath your surface skin colour. The three main directions are warm, cool, and neutral.
undertoneQuiz.seoFaq2: Is undertone the same as skin tone?
undertoneQuiz.seoFaq2Answer: No. Skin tone is how light or deep your skin is. Undertone is the underlying hue direction.
undertoneQuiz.seoFaq3Answer: No. Surface tan changes but the underlying undertone stays the same for life.
undertoneQuiz.seoFaq4: What if my answers are split between warm and cool?
undertoneQuiz.seoFaq4Answer: You are very likely neutral. Neutral undertones can wear shades from both families.
undertoneQuiz.seoFaq5Answer: For undertone direction it is very reliable in good daylight without makeup. For more precision, upload a selfie at our AI Try-On Studio.

undertoneQuiz.seoLink2: Best lipstick shades for cool undertones
undertoneQuiz.seoLink3: Best lipstick shades for neutral undertones
